title: Mannequin
writer: Frances Agnew, Fannie Hurst, Walter Woods
actors: Alice Joyce, Warner Baxter, Dolores Costello
plot: Dim-witted nursemaid Annie Pogani, who loves children, steals a baby girl from Selene Herrick, a wealthy woman who cares more for auctions than for family life. The girl, known as Orchid, is reared by Annie in an East Side tenemen...
